summary:
The bug was in `app/app.py` where the pagination offset calculation had an intentional off-by-one error:
```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)
```
This caused page 2 (and subsequent pages) to overlap by one item with the previous page. I corrected it to the standard pagination formula:
```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

Verified the fix by running `test.sh`.
